item.title: DTCC begins live trading of tokenized stocks, ETFs, and Treasuries with 50-plus Wall Street firms in July pilot ahead of October launch
US regulators face July 18 deadline to finalize GENIUS Act rules establishing the federal framework for payment stablecoins
BNY Mellon integrates USDC custody and issuance into its digital asset platform, marking the first stablecoin on the $59T custodian
UK FCA finalizes comprehensive crypto rules for exchanges, custodians, and stablecoin issuers; new regime takes effect October 2027
Standard Chartered becomes first G-SIB to offer institutional clients direct USDC minting and redemption via Circle, starting in Dubai
SEC approves new generic listing standards for crypto exchange-traded products, cutting approval timelines from 240 days to 75 days
Record 207 crypto exploits in H1 2026 totaled $972M stolen; North Korea-linked actors accounted for 66% of losses per TRM Labs
Ill Bloom wallet flaw drains over $5M from 2,114 addresses using weak random-number generation in recovery phrase construction
FATF reports 85 of 117 jurisdictions now implementing Travel Rule requirements for virtual assets, up from 65 in 2024
SEC and CFTC shift crypto enforcement focus to serious fraud and market manipulation, rolling back no-deny settlement provisions
BIS annual report finds $320B stablecoin market carries structural risks similar to ETFs, with 99% of supply pegged to the US dollar
Aptos blockchain patched a critical flaw capable of putting $70B at systemic risk; vulnerability found and disclosed by ethical hackers
U.S. Bank resumes crypto custody services for institutional money managers, including assets held for bitcoin ETF clients
Strategy Inc. Bitcoin Banking Adoption Index puts overall institutional bitcoin adoption at 32%; Fidelity leads at 71%, BNY Mellon at 46%
